name: Green Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 can cream of mushroom soup, condensed
Additional grated Cheddar cheese -- for topping
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Melt butter in an ovenproof 8" x 8-inch casserole dish and set aside. Combine onion and broccoli in a small saucepan with a small amount of water and cook until just cooked. Combine all ingredients and blend well; spread in casserole dish and top with additional Cheddar cheese, as desired. Bake for 10 to 15 minutes or until heated through. Serves 8.
